allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "idea-vanguard.html exists: $\(Test-Path 'G:\\My Drive\\IDEA-git\\IDEA\\idea-vanguard.html'\)"; Write-Output "vanguard dir exists: $\(Test-Path 'G:\\My Drive\\IDEA-git\\IDEA\\vanguard'\)"; if \(Test-Path 'G:\\My Drive\\IDEA-git\\IDEA\\idea-vanguard.html'\) { Write-Output "size: $\(\(Get-Item 'G:\\My Drive\\IDEA-git\\IDEA\\idea-vanguard.html'\).Length\)" })
PowerShell($src = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($src\){ $src.Source } else { "node not found" })
PowerShell(foreach\($c in 'deno','bun','npx'\){ $g=Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($g\){ "$c -> $\($g.Source\)" } else { "$c not found" } })
PowerShell($nodeCmd = Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($nodeCmd\){ $nodeCmd.Source } else { "no node" })

PowerShell($node = Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($node\){"node: $\($node.Source\)"}else{"no node"}; $py = Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($py\){"python: $\($py.Source\)"}else{"no python"}; $chrome = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"\) | Where-Object {Test-Path $_}; if\($chrome\){"chrome: $\($chrome[0]\)"}else{"no chrome"}; $edge = "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"; if\(Test-Path $edge\){"edge: $edge"}else{"no edge"})

PowerShell($chrome = "$env:ProgramFiles\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"; if\(-not \(Test-Path $chrome\)\){ $chrome = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe" }; & $chrome --headless=new --disable-gpu --window-size=400,800 --screenshot="G:\\My Drive\\IDEA-git\\IDEA\\_layouttest.png" "G:\\My Drive\\IDEA-git\\IDEA\\_layouttest.html" 2>&1 | Out-String; if\(Test-Path "G:\\My Drive\\IDEA-git\\IDEA\\_layouttest.png"\){"screenshot OK"}else{"FAILED"})
